english: The Lord, master of vital breath, all-pervading, lord of the universe
roman: Prabhum Prana natham vibhum Vishva natham

english: The master of Jagannatha, lord of gods, the supreme
The one truth of the three Vedas, pervading the world
roman: Trayi tattvam ekam jagad vyapakam tam

english: I praise the great Mahadeva, Bhava and Shankara
roman: Maha devam ide Bhavam Shankara cha

english: With a skull garland at the throat, a network of serpents on the body
roman: Gale runda malam tanau sarpa jalam

english: The great death of death, the protector and lord of Ganesha
The Ganga water that arose from the parting of matted locks
I praise the great Mahadeva, Bhava and Shankara
roman: Maha devam ide Bhavam Shankaram cha

english: This sacred Shiva Ashtakam — whoever reads it with devotion
roman: Shiva ashtakam idam punyam yah pathed bhakti samyutah

english: Attains the world of Shiva and rejoices together with Shiva
